form.formComment: Solid performance to win by a nose at this track over 300m (17.91) beating Miss Clarence in Grade 5 on April 11. Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last on April 1 over 300m at this track behind Midnight Dash beaten 13 lengths (18.30) in a Grade 4/5. Has a superb 17.32 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.
